user_query: has there been any update to the remote work rules?
final_answer_preview:
I checked the intranet for updates on the remote work rules. There have been no updates since the Remote Work Policy 2025 last updated on 2025-01-10.

Remote Work Policy 2025 (last updated 2025-01-10):
- Create IT supports a hybrid-first work model.
- Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week.
- Home office equipment budget: €500 one-time, €100/year recurring.
